headline: Shares of oil-related companies are trading lower as oil prices retreat to under $90 per barrel after President Trump's comments about the conflict with Iran ending soon. Also, G7 governments will meet on Tuesday to discuss using strategic oil reserves.
summary: Shares of oil-related companies are trading lower as oil prices retreat to under $90 per barrel after President Trump's comments about the conflict with Iran ending soon. Also, G7 governments will meet on Tuesday to discuss using strategic oil reserves.
